reply:
[[BLOCK:srt_1]]
Speaker 1: Hello, everyone.

[[BLOCK:srt_2]]
Speaker 1: My name is Brent White.

[[BLOCK:srt_3]]
Speaker 1: I am the President of Golden Gate University (金门大学).

[[BLOCK:srt_4]]
Speaker 1: I’m a professor of law and previously taught at the University of Arizona (亚利桑那大学) and the University of Hawaii at Manoa (夏威夷大学马诺阿分校). It’s truly an honor and a pleasure to serve as President of Golden Gate University.

[[BLOCK:srt_5]]
Speaker 2: My name is Bruce Magnet.

[[BLOCK:srt_6]]
Speaker 2: I serve as the Provost of Golden Gate University.

[[BLOCK:srt_7]]
Speaker 2: Like many of our faculty members, I began my career in the private sector, working in international banking and finance. Over the past 25 years, I’ve focused on global and online education.

[[BLOCK:srt_8]]
Speaker 3: Brian, hello.

[[BLOCK:srt_9]]
Speaker 3: We’re all delighted to hear that you’ve returned.

[[BLOCK:srt_10]]
Speaker 3: Could you share what motivated you to come back?

[[BLOCK:srt_11]]
Speaker 3: How do you view this new stage of development for Golden Gate University (GGU) and our partnership?

[[BLOCK:srt_12]]
Speaker 1: Of course.
